recommendations.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
recommendations.overview: After a family tragedy, three generations of the Deetz family return home to Winter River. Still haunted by Betelgeuse, Lydia's life is turned upside down when her teenage daughter, Astrid, accidentally opens the portal to the Afterlife.

recommendations.title: Being John Malkovich
recommendations.overview: One day at work, unsuccessful puppeteer Craig finds a portal into the head of actor John Malkovich. The portal soon becomes a passion for anybody who enters its mad and controlling world of overtaking another human body.

recommendations.title: Look Away
recommendations.overview: A timid and socially alienated 17-year-old high school student's life is turned upside down when she switches places with her sinister mirror image.
